localRatingResult.rationale: The checked-in harness orients agents and routes them to deeper guidance with assessable controls.

ratingResult.rationale: Harness covers setup, scoped work, verification, mutation, and handoff guidance.
Instructions preserve the split between skill judgment and CLI mechanics.

Harness quality is inspectable through guides, hooks, workflows, and feedback logs.
